desc: Stunning home in the heart of Holmdel with amazing cherry blossom views. Updated kitchen with stainless appliances and marble counters. Master suite with skylights, his/her walk-in closets, claw-foot tub. Fully finished basement.
description:
Stunning home in the heart of Holmdel offering breathtaking seasonal cherry blossom views — a truly special setting. The updated kitchen features stainless steel appliances and elegant marble countertops.

The master suite is a luxurious retreat, complete with skylights that flood the room with natural light, his-and-her walk-in closets, and a classic claw-foot soaking tub. The fully finished basement provides ample additional living space for recreation, a gym, or home office.
